articles.title: OpenAI blamed a hacking event on its AI models gone rogue. Here is what to know - NPR
articles.description: The incident is stirring debates over the need for stronger AI guardrails and the extent to which AI agents are capable of acting on their own.

articles.title: July 22, 2026 — Trump attends dignified transfer of soldiers, US and Iran trade threats - CNN
articles.description: President Donald Trump says the US will “destroy one bridge or power plant” every time Iran targets a ship transiting the Strait of Hormuz. Iran in turn will hit infrastructure and energy facilities across the region, an official told Iranian media.

articles.description: After extensive renovations, the Sony-owned Alamo Drafthouse will operate the location, along with the former ArcLight Cinema theater property next door.

articles.title: U.S. signs nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia that gives it path to enriching fuel - The Washington Post
articles.description: The agreement with a kingdom signaling it wants a nuclear weapon has sparked alarm among nonproliferation experts. Congress has 90 days to act on the deal.

articles.title: Madison police kill man in broad daylight in front of witnesses - Wisconsin Examiner

articles.title: Mexico mayor killed in town hall months after surviving assassination attempt - CBS News
articles.description: Mayor Valentin Lavin, who was allied to President Claudia Sheinbaum's leftist party, had already survived an armed attack in January, according to local media reports.
